Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Dark Monarch Lich's Circlet Energy Shield: 171 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.1765 Unique ID: 65cf357089b1b3101261aa3d00d369b980f7122a8693fa35d725a36174710fda Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: R-B-R-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 1 37% increased Burning Damage +51 to maximum Energy Shield +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems +33% to Chaos Resistance 50% reduced Light Radius Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Svalinn Girded Tower Shield Armour: 480 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.075 Ward: 126 WardBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 15d73476db26daf31e16a7d91bf86756071b77d84ac7ee4d8fc25e9c82544e68 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 1 +20 to maximum Life 15% Chance to Block Spell Damage +105 to Ward -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage -10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage Chance to Block is Lucky Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

Rarity: UNIQUE The Covenant Spidersilk Robe Energy Shield: 402 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.4415 Unique ID: 18f5f68c193ffba7cade6021fbba1be4cfe13a6933ca6530724459ca47f161bc Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-B-R-R-G-R LevelReq: 49 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems 5% reduced Lightning Damage taken Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 29 Added Chaos Damage +20 to Intelligence 210% increased Energy Shield 10% increased maximum Life Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 100% of Base Mana Cost Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Brimstone March Legion Boots Armour: 118 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.875 Energy Shield: 25 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: f36ccd108c2f017ba61619cf11373eaf471487baadea37be0653edaad7841821 Item Level: 85 Quality: 0 Sockets: B-B-B-R LevelReq: 76 Implicits: 2 Ignites you inflict deal Damage 7% faster Drops Scorched Ground while moving, lasting 3 seconds {fractured}Your Travel Skills Critically Strike once every 3 uses +109 to maximum Life +41% to Fire Resistance +45% to Cold Resistance +27% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}20% increased Movement Speed {crafted}100% chance to Avoid being Chilled

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt Unique ID: d9fefb65eda0ecedff9ea0feb89c04c7ae45b16d04b145d30b27a569cfd6305b Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 +40 to maximum Life +50 to Strength +63 to Dexterity +60 to maximum Life 22% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

Rarity: UNIQUE The Primordial Chain Coral Amulet Unique ID: 5028f0cf9f00b0ab08f522be0e68251a4b4f5a96751fcc92ffc65be507ce1971 Item Level: 78 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Whispers of Doom Regenerate 2.5 Life per second +4 to maximum number of Summoned Golems You cannot have non-Golem Minions 30% reduced Golem Size Golems Deal 35% less Damage Golems have 31% less Life Golems have 95% increased Movement Speed Primordial Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Hate Caress Precursor Gauntlets Armour: 455 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.9819 Unique ID: f1b9d335d9d4b3939d416e098368fe64b4d2d198f559d6ee4e14664e97e9befa Item Level: 82 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-G-B LevelReq: 78 Implicits: 2 Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit, applying -13% to Fire Resistance Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.6 metres {fractured}Ignites you inflict deal Damage 10% faster +27 to Armour +132 to maximum Life 15% increased Rarity of Items found +47% to Cold Resistance {crafted}+20% to Fire and Lightning Resistances

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Tremor Rod Military Staff Unique ID: 93e35cdaafe5a414212f1486eebdde78260b3afdc284da7bac8a27326d45ebeb Item Level: 76 Quality: 11 Sockets: G-B LevelReq: 41 Implicits: 1 +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff +2 to Level of Socketed Spell Gems 42% increased Spell Damage 16% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold Mines can be Detonated an additional time {mutated}99% increased Effect of Auras from Mines

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Razor of the Seventh Sun Midnight Blade Unique ID: abb5320d24a3b039737fe6de23e89f42dd986ac8a6ad0ead32134ff1aa04908b Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G-G LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Fire Modifier magnitudes 40% increased Global Accuracy Rating Adds 108 to 185 Physical Damage 31% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage 23% chance to Ignite 124% increased Burning Damage if you've Ignited an Enemy Recently Recover 1% of Life when you Ignite an Enemy {mutated}Ignites inflicted with this Weapon deal 122% more Damage Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Berek's Respite Two-Stone Ring Unique ID: 2817554a6616f5f80412348c435bcba0fc0b7aa7bfc3683b0bf5985f0314015c Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 1 +16% to Fire and Lightning Resistances Adds 26 to 49 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks 33% increased Lightning Damage +30 to maximum Mana When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy {mutated}Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 6% of their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock

Rarity: RARE Torment Coil Helical Ring Unique ID: 293cdd44115ebdbeff608dd6656bbfdc31d0505bcf8a975118ee1a193952b31c Item Level: 84 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 4 -2 Prefix Modifiers allowed +1 Suffix Modifier allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 50% increased Suffix Modifier magnitudes {fractured}+25% to Damage over Time Multiplier +95 to Dexterity +92 to maximum Life 39% increased Rarity of Items found +78% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: MAGIC Saturated Eternal Life Flask of Allaying Unique ID: d936650b3338a766fbdfee2bf6e921beac60550a22438a9204066eee916f8e5a Item Level: 85 Quality: 22 LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 0 69% increased Amount Recovered 33% reduced Recovery rate Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 13 seconds if used while Bleeding Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 13 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood
